current_v2.description: Current production tactical explainer prompt: grassroots coach persona, style guardrails, compact metrics, JSON fields.

minimal_schema.description: Minimal schema-only prompt. Tests whether model quality alone can produce useful coaching text without detailed style constraints.

no_jargon_guard.description: Production prompt with the jargon/style guard weakened. Tests whether the guardrails materially improve grassroots readability.

metric_first.description: Production prompt plus explicit instruction to start from the largest metric/event before giving advice.

few_shot_coach.description: Production prompt plus one short example of acceptable coach-facing output.
